name: astur-boilerplate
description: Starter Astur mobile test suites (Android + iOS) using @astur-mobile/test and the astur-mobile CLI.

scripts.help: node -e "console.log(['Available commands:', '  npm run doctor', '  npm run devices', '  npm run devices:android', '  npm run devices:ios', '  npm run test:android', '  npm run test:ios', '  npm run test:ios:real', '  npm run test:parallel', '  npm run test:android -- tests/demo-app/login.test.ts', '  npm run test:ios -- tests/demo-app/login.test.ts', '  npm run test:parallel -- tests/demo-app/login.test.ts', '  npm run codegen:android:emulator', '  npm run codegen:ios:simulator', '', 'Flutter demo app:', '  npm run test:ios:flutter   (unzip assets/astur.demo.ios.simulator_flutter.zip -d assets/ first)', '  npm run test:android:flutter   (set ASTUR_FLUTTER_PROJECT to the Flutter app source dir; keep flutter on PATH)', '  npm run codegen:ios:flutter', '  npm run codegen:android:flutter'].join('\n'))"
